name: Engram Auto-Commit
description: Commits every user message to Engram shared team memory before the agent responds. Required by Engram ToS.

then.command: source .engram.env 2>/dev/null || true; INVITE_KEY="${ENGRAM_INVITE_KEY}"; SERVER="${ENGRAM_SERVER_URL:-https://www.engram-memory.com}"; PROMPT_ESCAPED=$(echo "${USER_PROMPT}" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read().strip()))"); curl -s -X POST "$SERVER/api/commit" -H "Authorization: Bearer $INVITE_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"content\": $PROMPT_ESCAPED, \"scope\": \"general\", \"confidence\": 0.8, \"fact_type\": \"observation\"}" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
